summary: Click Psychology Optimization testing complete. All 14 features verified. Backend: 100% pass rate (8/8 tests). Frontend: 100% pass rate. Story cards redesigned with cinematic 4:5 aspect ratio, hook text overlaid on thumbnails, urgency messages, rotating CTA variants, social proof badges, and hover animations. A/B tracking working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Story cards use cinematic 4:5 aspect ratio (aspect-[4/5]) - taller than previous 16:9
Hook text is overlaid on thumbnail with white bold text, truncated to 65 chars with ellipsis
formatHook function correctly truncates text and adds ellipsis for incomplete thought effect
CTA variants rotate correctly: index % 3 maps to ['See What Happens Next', 'Continue This Story', 'What Happens Next?']
Urgency messages are truth-based: URGENCY_ACTIVE for stories with continuations, URGENCY_FIRST for new stories
Social proof badges working: 'Trending' (amber) for 10+ continuations, 'Early story' (violet) for 1-9, 'Just dropped' (emerald) for 0
Card hover effects: translateY(-4px) lift animation, thumbnail scale+brightness, CTA transforms to amber bg
Card click tracking sends story_id, cta_variant, source to /api/engagement/card-click
Card analytics returns variant breakdown with click counts and percentages
No '0 today' or '0 continuations' displayed - truth-based hype text working
Zero-friction regression passed: unauthenticated users can access /app/story-video-studio
seed_data_creation: Created test card clicks for A/B tracking verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Click Psychology Optimization testing complete. All features verified: (1) Dashboard loads at /app/dashboard with trending stories section. (2) Story cards use cinematic 4:5 aspect ratio. (3) Hook text overlaid on thumbnail, truncated with ellipsis. (4) Urgency text below hook (truth-based messages). (5) CTA variants rotate: 'See What Happens Next', 'Continue This Story', 'What Happens Next?'. (6) CTA button transforms on hover (amber bg, black text). (7) Social proof badges at top-left: Trending, Just dropped, Early story. (8) Card lifts on hover (translateY animation). (9) Backend card-click tracking works. (10) Backend card-analytics returns variant breakdown. (11) No '0 today' or '0 continuations' on dashboard. (12) Clicking story card navigates to /app/story-video-studio. (13) Zero-friction regression: unauthenticated user can access studio. (14) A/B tracking data: 6 total clicks, 3 variants tracked.

Feature_2_Cinematic_Aspect_Ratio.details: Story cards use 4:5 aspect ratio (0.80) - taller than previous 16:9

Feature_3_Hook_Text_Overlaid.details: Hook text is white, bold, overlaid on thumbnail image area

Feature_4_Hook_Truncated.details: Hook text truncated with ellipsis for incomplete thought effect (e.g., 'A short test story about a cat who goes on an adventure in the...')

Feature_5_Urgency_Text.details: Urgency text below hook: 'Someone just continued this', 'This story isn't finished', 'Be the one who writes what's next', 'Your turn to continue'

Feature_6_CTA_Variants_Rotate.details: 3 unique CTA variants found: 'See What Happens Next', 'Continue This Story', 'What Happens Next?'

Feature_7_CTA_Hover_Transform.details: CTA button transforms to amber background (rgb(245, 158, 11)) on hover

Feature_8_Social_Proof_Badges.details: Badges visible at top-left: 'Early story' (violet), 'Just dropped' (emerald)

Feature_9_Card_Lift_Hover.details: Card lifts on hover with matrix(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, -4) transform (translateY animation)

Feature_11_Backend_Card_Analytics.details: GET /api/engagement/card-analytics returns variant breakdown: 6 total clicks, 3 variants

Feature_12_No_Zero_Regression.details: No '0 today' or '0 continuations' on dashboard - shows 'Fresh stories waiting', 'Be the first to continue'

Feature_13_Card_Click_Navigation.details: Clicking story card navigates to /app/story-video-studio with story pre-filled

Feature_14_Zero_Friction_Regression.details: Unauthenticated user can access /app/story-video-studio directly without redirect to login

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. Card-click and card-analytics endpoints are PUBLIC (no auth required).
